changeSet.author: brogres
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO workout (workout_date, created_by, modified_by, created_on, modified_on) SELECT DATE '2026-03-27', NULL, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM workout WHERE workout_date = DATE '2026-03-27');
INSERT INTO workout_set (exercise, repetitions, body_part, weight, line_order, workout_id, status) SELECT v.exercise, v.repetitions, v.body_part, v.weight, v.line_order, w.id, v.status FROM workout w CROSS JOIN ( VALUES ('Butterfly', 12, 'chest', 14.0, 0, 'DONE'), ('Butterfly', 12, 'chest', 14.0, 1, 'DONE'), ('Butterfly', 10, 'chest', 16.0, 2, 'DONE'),
('Incline Bench Press', 8, 'chest', 40.0, 3, 'DONE'), ('Incline Bench Press', 8, 'chest', 42.0, 4, 'DONE'), ('Incline Bench Press', 6, 'chest', 44.0, 5, 'DONE'),
('Bench Press', 8, 'chest', 60.0, 6, 'DONE'), ('Bench Press', 8, 'chest', 65.0, 7, 'DONE'), ('Bench Press', 6, 'chest', 70.0, 8, 'DONE'),
('Dip', 12, 'chest', NULL, 9, 'DONE'), ('Dip', 10, 'chest', NULL, 10, 'DONE'), ('Dip', 8, 'chest', NULL, 11, 'DONE'),
('Pull Up', 10, 'back', NULL, 12, 'DONE'), ('Pull Up', 8, 'back', NULL, 13, 'DONE'), ('Pull Up', 8, 'back', NULL, 14, 'DONE'),
('Wiosłowanie ze sztangą', 8, 'back', 70.0, 15, 'DONE'), ('Wiosłowanie ze sztangą', 8, 'back', 75.0, 16, 'DONE'), ('Wiosłowanie ze sztangą', 6, 'back', 80.0, 17, 'DONE'),
('Wiosłowanie na maszynie', 10, 'back', 55.0, 18, 'DONE'), ('Wiosłowanie na maszynie', 10, 'back', 60.0, 19, 'DONE'), ('Wiosłowanie na maszynie', 8, 'back', 65.0, 20, 'DONE'),
('Squat', 8, 'legs', 80.0, 21, 'DONE'), ('Squat', 8, 'legs', 85.0, 22, 'DONE'), ('Squat', 6, 'legs', 90.0, 23, 'DONE'),
('Squat na maszynie', 10, 'legs', 70.0, 24, 'DONE'), ('Squat na maszynie', 10, 'legs', 75.0, 25, 'DONE'), ('Squat na maszynie', 8, 'legs', 80.0, 26, 'DONE'),
('OHP sztanga', 8, 'shoulders', 40.0, 27, 'DONE'), ('OHP sztanga', 8, 'shoulders', 42.5, 28, 'DONE'), ('OHP sztanga', 6, 'shoulders', 45.0, 29, 'DONE'),
('OHP maszyna', 10, 'shoulders', 35.0, 30, 'DONE'), ('OHP maszyna', 10, 'shoulders', 37.5, 31, 'DONE'), ('OHP maszyna', 8, 'shoulders', 40.0, 32, 'DONE'),
('OHP hantle', 10, 'shoulders', 18.0, 33, 'DONE'), ('OHP hantle', 10, 'shoulders', 20.0, 34, 'DONE'), ('OHP hantle', 8, 'shoulders', 22.0, 35, 'DONE'),
('Chin Up', 10, 'arms', NULL, 36, 'DONE'), ('Chin Up', 8, 'arms', NULL, 37, 'DONE'), ('Chin Up', 8, 'arms', NULL, 38, 'DONE'),
('Hantle curl', 12, 'arms', 12.0, 39, 'DONE'), ('Hantle curl', 12, 'arms', 14.0, 40, 'DONE'), ('Hantle curl', 10, 'arms', 16.0, 41, 'DONE'),
('Prostowanie ramienia na maszynie', 12, 'arms', 25.0, 42, 'DONE'), ('Prostowanie ramienia na maszynie', 12, 'arms', 27.5, 43, 'DONE'), ('Prostowanie ramienia na maszynie', 10, 'arms', 30.0, 44, 'DONE') ) AS v(exercise, repetitions, body_part, weight, line_order, status) WHERE w.workout_date = DATE '2026-03-27' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM workout_set s WHERE s.workout_id = w.id);
